# Mbase Digital

Mbase Digital is a professional digital strategy, website development, search visibility, content strategy, and automation brand.

Core services:
- Search and AI visibility through technical SEO, content architecture, entity signals, and answer-ready pages.
- Research-led content systems including audience research, keyword mapping, topical plans, and editorial briefs.
- Performance website builds using server-rendered pages, semantic HTML, optimized assets, structured data, and responsive design.
- Automation and integrations for forms, CRM workflows, analytics, reporting, lead routing, and business tools.

Website standards:
- Server-first Next.js App Router implementation.
- Real HTML text content for users, search engines, and LLM crawlers.
- WebP-first optimized image workflow.
- Sitemap, robots, metadata, Open Graph, and schema foundations.
- Accessible navigation, headings, contrast, responsive layout, and useful alt text.
